name: Refrigerator
description: Ct is a single mother to 2 youths, 1 of whom is still in school, and 1 is working. Ct has multiple physical and mental health conditions, and has not been able to work for the past years, as she is partially bed-bound. Ct's eldest son is supporting the family, but his salary is insufficient to meet family's basic needs, including ct's medical needs. Ct's daughter juggles school and caregiving of ct. The family's refrigerator has broken down, and they are in need of one to store their perishables.

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Bukit Panjang
contact.name: Muhammad Idris Bin Mohd Margono

passiton.name: 647L Samsung Side-by-side Refrigerator (Non Halal)
passiton.description:
- Features a spacious interior with multiple shelves and drawers for organized storage. 
- Energy-efficient with a 'Good' rating. Includes energy consumption details on the sticker. 
- Minor wear and tear may be present on the exterior. Cooling system works perfectly. 
- Prefer to pick up between 28 Mar to 3 Apr

name: Vacuum
description:
Client is a diabetic patient who also experiences ongoing gastrointestinal issues. She suffers from frequent diarrhoea and urinary urgency, which has resulted in her needing to use diapers daily. The client often feels physically weak, making it difficult for her to secure stable employment.
She is known to SSO and currently receives financial assistance. While she has adequate informal support, the client prefers not to trouble her support network and will only seek help when she has insufficient funds. She stays alone in a rental flat.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Cheng San 445
contact.name: Frank Lye Wei Bin

passiton.name: Vacuum Cleaner To Bless
passiton.description: Dyson vacuum cleaner to bless. The joints have been taped up due to wear and tear but it is in great working condition.
